productDisplayName: Puma Women Sabadella Sequin Black Shoe
description: Composition:Black, sequinned, patent leather ballerina flats with rubber outsoleThese classy, feminine ballerina flats from puma are very feminine. The ultralight design is very comfortable and the mesh upper is almost ethereal. The black sequins and the puma logo clasp add a new glam yet sporty dimension while the rubber outsoles give greater grip. These shoes are a great combination of form and function.
